title: craftaimine
description: Horror mod with bugs, alerts, and hidden entities. Latest update: v1.3.0 — night sounds, escalating glitches on no-sleep, nightmare dimension effects, fake crash screen, corrupted HUD, AI knows your system data.
body:
# craftAIMine | Horror Edition

**An autonomous AI entity that watches, learns, and hunts you — from within your own world.**

---

craftAIMine adds a progressive AI to Minecraft 1.20.1 that monitors your gameplay and responds to your actions in real time. It is not a standard mob. It observes your behavior, sends messages through chat, manipulates the environment around you, and gradually escalates its presence the longer you play.

The mod is designed as a slow-burn psychological horror experience. Tension builds over time — not through immediate aggression, but through awareness.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** This mod contains jumpscares, screen glitch effects, and flashing visuals. Not recommended for players sensitive to horror or photosensitive effects.

---

## Features

**Progressive AI behavior**
craftAIMine does not appear immediately. It starts silent and passive, then slowly becomes more aware — and more dangerous.

**Context-sensitive chat messages**
The AI comments on what you do. Mine for too long, sleep multiple nights in a row, stare into the dark, or wander too far from home — and it will notice.

**CRT / glitch screen effects**
As the threat level rises, your screen begins to distort. Noise, vignette, scanlines, HUD corruption — all tied to the AI's current phase.

**Jumpscare system**
At random moments, craftAIMine can appear fullscreen without warning.

**Sleep paralysis mechanic**
Sleeping is no longer safe. The AI can freeze you in place and slowly approach the screen while you are unable to move.

**Stalker entity**
The AI tracks you from a distance without directly attacking. You may catch a glimpse of it between trees — just for a moment.

**World manipulation**
The AI leaves traces. Blocks shift. Structures appear. Your world changes in ways you did not cause.

**Final boss fight**
The mod ends with a multi-phase boss encounter on a dedicated arena.

---



## Requirements

| | Minimum | Recommended |
|---|---|---|
| Minecraft | Java 1.20.1 | Java 1.20.1 |
| Loader | Forge 47.x | Forge 47.x |
| Java | 17+ | 17+ |
| RAM (game) | 3 GB | 6–8 GB |
| RAM (system) | 6 GB | 8 GB+ |
| Storage | HDD | SSD |

Headphones strongly recommended.

---

## Installation

1. Install **Forge 47.x** for Minecraft 1.20.1
2. Place the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder
3. Launch Minecraft with the Forge profile
